title: Combustion and Flame 150 (2007) 2–26
abstract:
A nozzle conﬁguration for technically premixed gas turbine ﬂames was operated with CH4 and air at at-
mospheric pressure. The ﬂames were conﬁned by a combustion chamber with large quartz windows, allowing
the application of optical and laser diagnostics. In a distinct range of operating conditions the ﬂames exhibited
strong self-excited thermoacoustic pulsations at a frequency around 290 Hz. A ﬂame with P = 25 kW thermal
power and an equivalence ratio of Φ = 0.7 was chosen as a target ﬂame in or
